race.description: Tfb - Temporary Fence And Barrier Hire Hcp (55)
race.comment: Looks an ideal race for SIGLO DE ORO (2). Distant fourth on a very heavy track at Ballina last time and better than that. Just missed only try here three runs ago and can go one better. BOLD AS BRASS (4) is long overdue for a win including a last start second at Kilcoy. Tricky gate but the hot pace will suit and should be winding up late. ZARIPPA (6) showed good early dash last time out and led for most of the way before being claimed and finishing half a length away in second over 1100m at Warwick. Can feature in the finish. STREET DAZZLER (7) missed the placings two runs back then was always well out of her ground last start when 7 lengths away in seventh over 1000m at Sunshine Coast. Will find this more suitable and can improve sharply. ROCKY BLONDE (10) was paced at Dalby last time and looks next best.
